title: Optimized PvP
description: Lightweight PvP modpack built for smooth high FPS
body:
**Optimized PvP** – A lightweight, performance-focused PvP modpack built for smooth 200+ FPS on mid-tier laptops. Includes core performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and dynamic FPS optimizations. Packed with PvP essentials such as BactroMod, Combat Hitboxes, Crosshair Addons, Shield Statuses, and detailed HUD info (MiniHUD, Armor HUD, Player Reach Display). Designed to give you a clean, minimal setup without unnecessary lag. Perfect for competitive PvP or practice.

_Tested on a 15-month-old laptop, achieving ~400 FPS with all mods enabled._

_Note: Herobot is downloaded only for TheobaldTheBird's Practice Map_

**_This pack includes the 'PvP Practice Map' by TheobaldTheBird. All credit for the map goes to them!_**
